pr.title: content: Who Is an Illusion? What Is the More Interesting Question?
pr.body:
## Summary

New blog post: **Who Is an Illusion? What Is the More Interesting Question?**

A reflective essay exploring identity as illusion through three converging lenses:
- **Neurology** â€” Anil Seth's "controlled hallucination," the default mode network rebuilding the self every few seconds
- **LLMs** â€” what coherent personalities emerging from statistical pattern recognition reveals about our own sense of self
- **Systems thinking** â€” Donella Meadows' framework applied to identity; "who" as an emergent property of interconnected systems, not a fixed kernel

The post is written in the same personal, confessional style as recent memoir posts (intensity-and-i, my-algorithm, in-the-llm-i-saw-myself) with cross-links throughout. It follows the existing blog architecture (`src/content/blog/{slug}/` with `metadata.json` + `page.mdx`).

5 pixel art images were generated using Imagen 4 via the Nano Banana API key. The images are referenced from Bunny CDN URLs matching the existing pattern â€” **they need to be uploaded to Bunny CDN** at:
- `images/who-illusion-hero.webp`
- `images/who-illusion-neurons.webp`
- `images/who-illusion-llm-mirror.webp`
- `images/who-illusion-systems.webp`
- `images/who-illusion-river.webp`

Generated PNG source files are available in the session at `/home/ubuntu/repos/portfolio/generated-images/`.

Local build passes (`npm run build-only`). Banned words/phrases checked against CLAUDE.md rules.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] **Read the post for voice/tone accuracy** â€” this is a first draft attempting to match your memoir style from intensity-and-i, my-algorithm, etc. Likely needs your personal revision pass
- [ ] **Upload the 5 generated images to Bunny CDN** â€” convert PNGâ†’WebP and upload to `zackproser.b-cdn.net/images/who-illusion-*.webp`. The PNGs are attached below as previews
- [ ] **Review cross-links** â€” verify all internal links (`/blog/in-the-llm-i-saw-myself`, `/blog/intensity-and-i`, `/blog/my-algorithm`, `/blog/you-get-to-keep-the-neural-connections`, `/blog/executive-function-as-a-service`) resolve correctly
- [ ] **Run `npm run dev` and visit `/blog/who-is-an-illusion`** to verify rendering

### Generated Images Preview

![Hero - figure dissolving into network](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..pZTwvM17emyBJYb8KtJiJ6W6vn4vCS0AMB_0UFIZAxA)
![Neurons - brain with cascading pathways](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..CVGcwL5RgAaEhnK_aGjluzJ3TIXUHrTDQFPPRY72vJw)
![LLM Mirror - person made of text at screen](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..Pj62m0v63FjeJ8vgHeL66OlnOjUWXe2hbsKo_9aLgtA)
![Systems - overlapping circles venn diagram](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..dPpXcdaJJqS89iigdEBMzSVlA621JXnSqglhOKnf0RY)
![River - text river in canyon at twilight](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..PIKashCkfQ7FgFdK7hboVvwPr5ZriStZiAVzNyzTTQY)

### Notes

- The hero image URL in `metadata.json` points to `who-illusion-hero.webp` on Bunny CDN â€” this needs to exist before OG images will work
- Date is set to 2026-05-23 (today)
- Tags: `neurodivergent`, `systems-thinking`, `identity`, `llm`, `neurology`, `memoir`

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/7dab2086f44b47019cee54d17636febd
Requested by: @zackproser
